oldContent: Remote OK CNC Machinist Milling CX2 <p><span style="font-size: 16px">CX2 is a next-generation defense technology company founded to deliver spectrum dominance for the United States and our allies. CX2âs AI-enabled hardware and software platforms detect, disrupt and defend the electromagnetic spectrum across land, air, sea and space domains.</span></p><p><br></p><p data-local-id="23fffd49717f" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true" data-pm-slice="1 1 []">CX2 is seeking an engaged, self-starting machinist who wants to own prototyping and small volume production.</p><p data-local-id="23fffd49717f" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true" data-pm-slice="1 1 []">As the first CNC Machinist, you will be a key player in building out our machining capabilities for prototypes, tools and fixtures, and small batch production of flight critical components.&nbsp; You will touch all aspects of machining from procuring machines and cutting tools, programming, tooling, to assisting with one-off components and setups while ensuring critical dimensions are met.</p><p data-local-id="23fffd49717f" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true" data-pm-slice="1 1 []">You will mentor and provide guidance to engineers, technicians and machine operators and act as an internal expert on CNC milling.
